case_title: LVNV FUNDING, LLC VS. AIZA M. BACLIT et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

ORDER DETERMINING THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNING HELD TO THE JUDGENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL WITHHOLD $150.00 PER PAY PERIOED UNTIL JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED.
